classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Persists redacted Memory Core MCP tool-call telemetry.
 *
 * This is the Memory Core sibling of the Knowledge Base and Neural Link recorder services,
 * but it deliberately stores operational metadata only. Memory Core tool arguments can carry
 * prompts, thoughts, responses, and A2A message bodies; duplicating those payloads into a
 * telemetry table would violate the recorder's diagnostic purpose and increase leakage risk.
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.services.memory-core.MemoryCoreRecorderService
 * @extends Neo.core.Base
 * @singleton
 */
classData.summary:
Persists redacted Memory Core MCP tool-call telemetry.

This is the Memory Core sibling of the Knowledge Base and Neural Link recorder services,
but it deliberately stores operational metadata only. Memory Core tool arguments can carry
prompts, thoughts, responses, and A2A message bodies; duplicating those payloads into a
telemetry table would violate the recorder's diagnostic purpose and increase leakage risk.
classData.name: MemoryCoreRecorderService

classData.comment:
/**
         * @member {Object|null} db=null
         * @summary SQLite connection to the Memory Core graph database.
         * @protected
         */
classData.name: db
classData.summary: SQLite connection to the Memory Core graph database.

classData.description: Initializes the SQLite schema for Memory Core MCP tool telemetry.
classData.name: initAsync

classData.description: Creates the telemetry table and indexes if absent.
classData.name: ensureSchema

classData.description: Safely measures JSON payload size without storing the payload.
classData.name: measureBytes

classData.comment:
/**
     * Collects sensitive string values from known Memory Core payload fields so error
     * messages can redact direct echoes without storing the raw tool args.
     * @param {*} value Candidate payload tree.
     * @param {Set<String>} [values=new Set()] Accumulator.
     * @returns {Set<String>}
     */
classData.description: Collects sensitive string values from known Memory Core payload fields so error messages can redact direct echoes without storing the raw tool args.
classData.name: collectSensitiveValues

classData.description: Redacts sensitive direct-echo values and bounds the retained error message.
classData.name: buildErrorMessage

classData.description: Persists one redacted tool-call telemetry row. Best-effort only.
classData.name: logToolCall

classData.comment:
/**
     * Returns aggregate Memory Core MCP tool-call metrics without exposing raw payloads.
     * @param {Object} options
     * @param {Number} [options.sinceMs=config.toolTelemetry.aggregateWindowMs] Lookback window.
     * @param {Number} [options.limit=config.toolTelemetry.aggregateLimit] Max grouped tools.
     * @returns {Object}
     */
classData.description: Returns aggregate Memory Core MCP tool-call metrics without exposing raw payloads.
classData.name: getMemoryCoreToolMetrics
